The WhatsApp button `استعلم عن السعر عبر واتساب` was overflowing because: - `font-size: 1.05rem` with `min-width: 220px` — too much text for the button width - No word wrapping allowed **Changes:** - `font-size: 1.05rem` → `0.95rem` (slightly smaller) - `padding: 0.9rem 2 User: [object Object] Assistant: Assistant: Assistant: Assistant: Assistant: Assistant: Assistant: Assistant: Assistant: The video now shows via two paths: | Source | How video gets there | Example | |---|---|---| | **`data.js` (static)** | Has `video` field for 3 products | demy-9000, sharp-2hp, flomax-9500 | | **Admin dashboard (API)** | Save video via product edit → stored in DB as `video_url`
